title: SharkTank 2.0
name: Research and Development Club
overview:
SharkTank 2.0


Research and Development Club


Description

A premier pitching competition where participants present innovative ideas, projects, or prototypes to “Sharks,” fostering entrepreneurship by linking academic research with real world commercialization.


Team Size

Coming Soon...


Point of contact

Jaishankar Janardan : 9660997997
rules:
->eams of 2–4 (individuals allowed) present original, non commercialized ideas.
->Presentations must be in professional/business casual attire and last 8 minutes including Q&A.

title: Bomb's Away!
name: Robotics Club
overview:
Bomb's Away!


Robotics Club


Description

Bomb’s Away challenges participants to time the release of a payload from a remotely piloted aircraft onto a ground target. Success depends on judging speed, altitude, and wind for maximum accuracy.


Team Size

Coming Soon...


Point of contact

Dhanvanth Chandrasekaran : 7418056603
rules:
->Pilot announces the approach, participant times the trigger to drop the payload, and marshals record the result.
->No communication or interference with the pilot is allowed during the run.

title: Blaze
name: Robotics Club
overview:
Blaze


Robotics Club


Description

BLAZE is a laser Tag experience featuring a custom-built arena and DIY technology, challenging two teams to a 15-minute survivor match.


Team Size

Coming Soon...


Point of contact

Soumilya Dwivedi : 8448644855
rules:
->Two teams of four compete for 15 minutes; winners aredecided by points or full elimination.
->Players have 3 lives and register via RFID or manually;scores are tracked live.

title: Sumowar
name: Robotics Club
overview:
Sumowar


Robotics Club


Description

Enter the arena for an electrifying Sumo bot battle where teams fight to dominate the warzone. Push, punch, and strategize to outsmart opponents and claim victory!


Team Size

1


Point of contact

Srijoy Mukherjee :7569498783
rules:
->Two teams with 2 Sumobots each compete for 5 minutes,winning by pushing opponents out.
->If time ends, points (+10 Danger Zone, +5 punch)determine the winner.

name: FinWiz Club
overview:
Trading Ring


FinWiz Club


Description

Step into the world of high-stakes trading and test your financial instincts. Compete in a simulated stock market environment and prove your strategy under pressure.

1

rules:

title: Project Expo
name: model and Prototype
overview:
Project Expo


model and Prototype


Description

Project Expo is a platform for participants to showcase their innovative models and projects to an expert jury, gaining evaluation, recognition, and the visibility their work deserves


Team Size

Coming Soon...


Point of contact

Akhil : 90594 22616
rules:
Only original, participant-created projects are allowed; plagiarism will lead to disqualification.
->Each team must present their project within the allotted time and answer the jury’s questions clearly.

title: StockFischer
name: Chess Committee
overview:
StockFischer


Chess Committee


Description

The StockFischer AI Chess Engine event is a chess competition where participants challenge an AI chess engine. The event is expected to attract around 100 participants and will last approximately 2-3 hours, including an introduction and technical overview of the AI


Team Size

1


Point of contact

Chivukula Vydik :8008750604
rules:
->Each player gets a set amount of time for their moves; once a player's time runs out, they lose the game.
-> Participants will get a single chance to play a game against the Stock Fischer AI. The player who lasts the longest or wins will be the champion.

title: Code Red
name: HAM ARC Club
overview:
Code Red


HAM ARC Club


Description

Bomb Defusal Challenge,teams collaborate to solve riddles, decode messages, and defuse a bomb within a time limit. It tests problem solving, communication, and strategy skills.


Team Size

Coming Soon...


Point of contact

Vedant Nair : 81308 39268
rules:
->Teams must use only provided materials, no external help or devices allowed.
->Bypassing stages leads to disqualification, judge’s decisions are final.
